description: Matic Token (MATIC) emerged in 2019 as the native token of Matic Network (later Polygon), but was later sunset by Polygon, leaving the asset fragmented and standstill. NOW on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — ATC-20 MATIC gives original MATIC and POL holders instant finality, fixed ultra-low gas fee, and AI contract capability, turning it into a much faster, more secure and scalable asset in the Atlantis Kingdom.
name: Matic Token
